description: An Account Manager reaches out to a customer 90 days before their annual subscription is set to renew.

nodes.task_description: Identify a customer whose contract expires in 90 days.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls a report of upcoming renewals and selects a customer.

nodes.task_description: Review the customer's usage metrics and support ticket history to prepare for the call.

expected_outcome.value: Agent notes the customer has high adoption but has hit their API call limit several times.

nodes.task_description: Contact the customer to schedule a 'business review' meeting to discuss their renewal and the possibility of upgrading to a higher tier with more API calls.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully schedules a meeting to discuss renewal and a potential upsell.
